goal: Add a one-click copy action to the existing share dialog without changing backend contracts.

sourceRoadmap.successSignal: Users can copy the invite link with one click
sourceRoadmap.killSignal: The patch requires backend or permission changes

requirementBrief.problemStatement: Users can see the invite URL, but copying it still requires manual selection.
requirementBrief.solutionSummary: Add a one-click copy action with lightweight confirmation inside the existing share dialog.

userStories.want: copy the invite link with one click
userStories.benefit: share it without manually selecting text
acceptance: Dialog behavior test proves the current invite URL is copied

implementationDecisions: Reuse the existing invite URL source and dialog props
testingDecisions: Test through the share dialog behavior, not an internal helper
furtherNotes: Richer copied-state feedback is a separate UX requirement

externalBestPractice.privacyGuard: generalized terms only; no project names, private requirements, customer names, secrets, logs, or proprietary concepts
externalBestPractice.skippedReason: existing share-dialog behavior and repo tests are sufficient for the tiny design

knownEvidence: Existing dialog already renders the invite URL
The patch stays inside one UI/test surface

options.label: Tiny design copy action
options.good: Ships the visible user win with one dialog and one behavior test
options.costRisk: Leaves richer feedback and clipboard fallback work for later

options.label: Full share-flow redesign
options.good: Could solve broader invite UX issues in one larger pass
options.costRisk: Expands beyond the roadmap wedge and touches unrelated share contracts

decisionQuestions.impact: cc-do keeps implementation inside the share dialog and avoids backend or permission work

tasks.title: [TEST] Add a failing dialog test for the missing copy action
acceptance: The missing copy action is reproduced as a failing test

notes: Do not change share-service contracts in this task

tasks.title: [IMPL] Add the copy button and copied-state confirmation
acceptance: The dialog exposes a copy button and confirms the copied state

notes: Keep the patch inside the existing dialog

tasks.title: Run targeted checks and collect fresh evidence
acceptance: Fresh verification evidence is ready for cc-check

notes: Collect only fresh evidence from this run

deferredQuestions: If users still miss the copied-state confirmation, open RM-002 for richer feedback.
